response.overview: When the high-glamour world of fashion house Star Struck needs a gritty, authentic location for their next big runway show, they hire the fleet from Golden Cab. Stella (Maureen Ruby Jackson), the lead designer, is shocked to meet Penny (Maureen Ruby Jackson), a taxi driver who looks exactly like her. As the two girls swap lives for a day, they discover that while one has fame and the other has freedom, they both share the same "Great Voice."
response.title: Star Struck: The Golden Collision
